# isActive

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates if the picker is active.

## Declaration

```swift
var isActive: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

When this value is `true`, the capture stream picker is active, available for managing capture. The default value is `false`.
title: isActive
